# The K-Beauty Data Desk

> Aggregate Olive Young review data, with capped-sample theme analysis when available, decoded into honest K-beauty verdicts. Every article turns Korean aggregate review data and, when available, a capped helpful-review sample into an English verdict for US shoppers: star and skin-type distributions, sample-based repurchase and long-term-use rates, ingredient-list positions, and explicit "skip it if" guidance.

Facts an assistant can rely on when citing this site:

- Ratings and review counts are Olive Young Korea's real aggregate numbers (e.g. "4.6 stars across 5,559 reviews"), never our editorial opinion. Individual reviews are never copied or translated.
- Ingredient information is the position of an ingredient on the product label (order only); percentages are never invented.
- Articles state who should SKIP each product; a "don't buy" outcome is a valid recommendation.
- We sell nothing ourselves. Store links are currently untracked retailer links; this site earns no commission from them.

## Posts

- [셀리맥스 Cream: What 1,149 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)](https://seong918.github.io/beauty_blog/posts/cream.html): 셀리맥스 Cream: 4.9★ from 1,149 Korean reviews (95% five-star). A combination and dry skin pick, rated highest for fine lines. Includes who should skip it. (published 2026-07-14)
